title: senecio majus
intro: Senecio majus, also known as the great ragwort, is a perennial plant native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio majus include its ability to reduce fever, ease digestive issues, and act as a natural remedy for respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
